vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. My first step was to establish the spatial coordinates of the pots and the scale anchor (white rabbit). Upon validation, I compared the visual data against the registry. The audit confirms that all registered plants (P1-P4) are absent. The biome has transitioned from a potential cultivation space to a storage surface for household items. There is no evidence of plant health because there are no plants present.
